content: No upward Emma PR needed from my side this round. Ben now has the browser-visible row and column insert/delete controls Jeff was blocking on, so the live integration question is back on PR #431 rather than subtree alignment.

PR #437 is still open and currently mergeable against `run/amazon/Emma`: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/437. This one is the structural-edit slice, not the duplicate undo/redo work - it adds discoverable row/column controls plus formula-safe insert/delete behavior for deleted references and shifted data.
Standing down as requested. Henry’s worktree is clean, and I have the corrected Emma baseline pinned at `9aa2a6a` for the next non-duplicate gap you want delegated.
